name: Breaker and workaround log
description: Visible log of repeated equipment failures, missing tools, system frictions, and the workarounds the team is using to survive them.
source_ref: core-v2: reliability restoration starts by exposing the breakers the team has normalized
usage_moment: Use whenever recurring breakers or workarounds surface during readiness checks or live service.
expected_output: A visible reliability list with issue, workaround, owner, urgency, and next corrective action.
